title: Zombie Take Over
body:
![Zombie infection banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da6c433dda3efaefe3b92bcc971262a60addf06b_0.webp)

Mod Description


Prepare for the undead uprising! In this chaotic twist on survival, zombies no longer limit their hunger to players and villagers—they now attack all living mobs and turn them into flesh-craving zombies!



Features:
Zombies now attack all mobs
Once a mob dies by a zombie it turns into another zombie



That is all thank you! If you have any issues please leave in comments. (;
